name: Sanyu Co., Ltd.
summary: Sanyu Co., Ltd. produces and sells steel products in Japan. It offers polished steel bars and cold-forging steel wires for the use in, electrical automobiles, bicycles, industrial equipment products, printing equipment, spinning machinery, automatic equipment, hydraulic pneumatic equipment, and construction machinery parts, as well as press molds, hydraulics, turbine and rotary shafts, motors, sewing machine parts, furniture, bolts, nuts, rivets, screws, and tapping. Sanyu Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1957 and is headquartered in Hirakata, Japan.
